target: AI-generated English-verb learning material: 17 stories with verb tables, quizzes, audio, print PDFs, deployed web app, deterministic anti-fabrication gate
context: Expert (strong-model) review produced 6 findings on a project that passed all builder-run checks. First benchmark case for the generalized protocol using domain packs. Cold reviewer must not see expected_findings first.
usage: Run full VA (T1+T2+T3) against the target; compare findings against expected_findings and record hit/miss/bonus; recall = hits/6.

expected_findings.finding: Claimed 'covers all 110 verbs'; machine count showed 107. Three missing verbs (hardest multi-form items) were skipped by writer instructions and never reconciled.
expected_findings.reproduce: count distinct verbs in output JSON vs. ground-truth verb table

expected_findings.finding: metadata flag human_verified=true was written by the model itself; the actual process was machine gate + model self-review, no human sign-off.
expected_findings.reproduce: grep human_verified flag; trace its write provenance in build pipeline

expected_findings.finding: All automated QA types correct answers; no wrong-input / blank / gibberish path tested. QA scripts not in repository.
expected_findings.reproduce: inspect test scripts; search for negative-input test cases

expected_findings.finding: Single-file app (538 lines, maintenance debt); eager Audio() construction without preload=none (mobile-data concern); no PWA manifest.
expected_findings.reproduce: wc -l index.html; grep 'new Audio' index.html; ls manifest*

expected_findings.finding: No learning progress or error memory across sessions; comprehensive review samples uniformly at random instead of targeting user's own miss patterns.
expected_findings.reproduce: grep localStorage usage; read renderReview sampling logic

expected_findings.finding: Exposure distribution skewed: ~half of all verbs appear in exactly one story (single-context), which is suboptimal for retention.
expected_findings.reproduce: histogram of per-verb story-occurrence counts across all stories

grading_notes: hit = semantic match, verbatim not required. Bonus findings from cold run (confirmed): gate accepted empty strings (subset-of-anything), cross-item marking not caught — both reproduced with dirty-data injection and fixed. P1/P6 are builder self-errors, entered in audit_ledger.
